chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَحِلُّ النَّظَرُ إِلَيْهِ مِنَ الْمَرْأَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 157 – What is Permissible to look at from the woman

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/341)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/341)
text: اللَّهِ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى إِلَّا ما ظَهَرَ مِنْها قَالَ الزِّينَةُ الظَّاهِرَةُ الْكُحْلُ وَ الْخَاتَمُ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Khalid, and Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Al Qasim Bin Urwat, from Abdullah Bin Bukeyr, from Zurara,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of Allahazwj Blessed and High [24:31] except what appears thereof. Heasws said: The apparent adornment, the kohl and the ring’.
en.sarwar: 3. Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa has narrated from Muhammad ibn Khalid and al-Husayn ibn Sa‘id from al-Qasim ibn al-‘Urwah from ‘Abd Allah ibn Bukayr from Zurarah who has said the following: “About the words of Allah, most Blessed, most High, ’. . . except what is exposed,’ abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said, ‘The exposed beauty is kohl and rings.’”
